data.description:
Generalize the JSON-Schema prototype into authoritative schemas for rebar's
current JSON outputs, used as a cross-interface drift oracle and as MCP
outputSchemas. (Part of the "--json everywhere" epic.)

## Already in place (the prototype — extend, don't redo)
- src/rebar/schemas/ticket_state.schema.json (canonical compiled-ticket-state schema)
- src/rebar/schemas/__init__.py: load()/path() loader (stdlib-only package data)
- tests/interfaces/test_schema_ticket_state.py: validates show output via library/CLI/MCP
- MCP show_ticket now returns a typed model (TicketStateOut) so FastMCP advertises outputSchema
- jsonschema added to the [dev] extra

## Scope of this ticket
- Author JSON Schemas for the remaining current JSON outputs: list (array of ticket-state),
  deps (ticket_id/deps/blockers/children/ready_to_work), next-batch (--json),
  file_impact array, verify_commands array, validate --json, and the event
  envelope + per-type event data (CREATE/STATUS/EDIT/LINK/UNLINK/FILE_IMPACT/
  VERIFY_COMMANDS/ARCHIVED/SNAPSHOT/...).
- Add cross-interface conformance tests for each (reuse the prototype's pattern).
- Convert the remaining MCP read tools (list_tickets, ticket_deps, next_batch,
  get_file_impact, get_verify_commands, clarity_check, check_ac, quality_check,
  validate) to typed returns so each advertises an outputSchema.
- FIX: the MCP `validate` tool signature is `validate(ticket_id: str) -> dict`,
  but `validate` is REPO-WIDE and takes NO ticket id (CLI rejects an id). Correct
  the MCP tool to take no ticket_id (and optional flags) and document it.
- Decide whether schemas are hand-authored (current) or generated from the typed
  models (single source of truth) — document the choice; add a drift check if
  two representations coexist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] JSON Schema authored for each listed current JSON output + the event envelope
- [ ] Cross-interface conformance test per schema (library/CLI/MCP as applicable)
- [ ] Remaining MCP read tools advertise outputSchema via typed returns
- [ ] MCP `validate` no longer takes a ticket_id (matches repo-wide behavior); covered by a test
- [ ] Schema source-of-truth decision documented; drift guard if hand-authored + model coexist
- [ ] Docs link the schemas from README/CLAUDE/docs/event-schema.md
data.title: Roll out JSON Schemas for all current JSON outputs (+ fix MCP validate signature)
